summary: Tested AD ID auto-generation feature for WiseDrive CRM. All 6 backend tests passed. The fix correctly auto-generates AD IDs when Twilio doesn't send CtwaClid, ensuring leads can be tracked and city-mapped consistently.
critical_code_review_comments: Strategy 4 (lines 3038-3076): Correctly auto-generates ad_id when city is extracted from ReferralHeadline keyword
Strategy 5 (lines 3082-3141): Correctly auto-generates ad_id from unmapped_ads when using fallback city
Auto-generated ad_ids follow pattern: auto_{ad_name_prefix}_{date} for easy identification
Audit trail correctly logs ad_id auto-generation steps (ad_id_auto_generated, ad_id_from_unmapped)
Final assignment in webhook_audit correctly includes the auto-generated ad_id
seed_data_creation: Test leads created via webhook: +918765432190 (city keyword test with auto ad_id), +918765432191 (no city keyword test with auto ad_id)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AD ID auto-generation feature fully tested. Key scenarios: (1) When CtwaClid is missing but ReferralHeadline contains city keyword - ad_id is auto-generated as 'auto_{ad_name}_{date}' (2) When CtwaClid is missing and no city keyword - ad_id is auto-generated from unmapped_ads entry. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_ad_id_auto_generation.py can be reused for regression testing.

features_tested.Strategy 4 - City keyword extraction wit: PASS - When ReferralHeadline contains city keyword (e.g., 'Bangalore'), city is extracted and ad_id is auto-generated
features_tested.Strategy 5 - Fallback city with auto ad_: PASS - When no city keyword found, fallback city is used and ad_id is auto-generated from unmapped_ads
features_tested.CtwaClid present - uses original: PASS - When CtwaClid IS sent by Twilio, it's used as ad_id (not auto-generated)
features_tested.ad_city_mapping creation: PASS - Auto-creates mapping when extracting city from ad_name keyword
features_tested.unmapped_ads entry creation: PASS - Auto-creates unmapped_ads entry when using fallback city
features_tested.Audit trail logging: PASS - city_lookup_log shows ad_id_auto_generated and ad_id_from_unmapped steps

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Missing AD ID on META WhatsApp leads when Twilio doesn't send CtwaClid
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Auto-generate AD ID from ad_name in Strategy 4 (city keyword) and Strategy 5 (fallback)
bug_fix_verification.verification: PASS - Both test phones now have auto-generated ad_ids, city mapping works correctly, audit trail shows auto-generation steps
